events.message: Corridor sensors report heavy inbound conditions from the south side (+166s delay).
events.tip: Increase demand estimate for this approach and consider pre-emptive green time allocation.

events.message: Corridor sensors report severe inbound conditions from the west side (+371s delay).
events.tip: Increase demand estimate for this approach and consider pre-emptive green time allocation.

insights.recommendation: Prioritize the east approach: it has the longest simulated queue, while corridor sensors show the strongest travel-time penalty on the west corridor.

data_provenance.google_delay_s: Live corridor travel-time delta versus free-flow baseline.
data_provenance.google_speed_kmh: Live corridor speed derived from approach distance and travel time.
data_provenance.target_veh_h: Simulation demand estimate derived from corridor pressure and a geometry-scaled approach capacity.
data_provenance.capacity_veh_h: Per-approach capacity scaled from monitored lane count, average lane width, and approach length.
data_provenance.saturation_ratio: Demand divided by geometry-scaled approach capacity (1.0 = fully saturated).
data_provenance.flow_veh_h: Observed SUMO flow rate over the rolling five-minute window.
data_provenance.queue_m: Stopped vehicles on monitored lanes multiplied by the configured vehicle length.
data_provenance.congested_pct: Share of monitored corridor intervals marked slow or jammed.
data_provenance.queue_utilization_pct: Stopped vehicles divided by geometry-derived approach storage capacity.
